title: The Elevate Show ‘22 is right around the corner!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you signed up for Elevate 22, monday.com’s annual global user conference yet? Registration is LIVE - The Elevate Show 2022 -

Not sure what we’re talking about? Here’s a quick recap
Elevate by monday.com is monday.com’s annual customer conference. It’s online, free, and open to everyone!

This year, you can expect:
Opening remarks on the future of work - with Roy Mann and Eran Zinman, our co-founders and CEOs
An inside scoop on new features and updates that are taking monday.com to the next level in 2023 - with Shirley Baumer, our product director
Product-focused Master Classes to give you the skills you need to maximize efficiency - with monday experts.
7-minute Work it Out Talks with insights to help you get ahead of the curve - with monday.com leaders.
Customer Stories from industry leaders for business guidance and inspiration
And MUCH more!

This year we are putting an extra emphasis on YOU, our community so if you have questions about Elevate 22, ask them below!

posts.author: troc (Marlon)
posts.cookedHtml: Forgive me if this is dispalyed and I’m overlooking it, but what is the date?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: The date is November 3rd! Register now for more content to come!
